Harbour Crest Dynamics Limited — HK Data Export Approval Note and DPA Schedule (HKEX-listed, PDPO compliant).
Scope: M&A due diligence data rooms, fund investor onboarding, and employment HR processing by Harbour Crest Dynamics Limited and processors Silver Quay Services Limited and CloudHarbor Technology (HK) Limited.
PDPO basis: personal data has the meaning in PDPO and is processed under DPP1 (minimisation), DPP2 (retention), and DPP3 (use and consent).
MNPI control: this workflow excludes inside information as defined in Part XIVA of the SFO; only HKEX-published announcements or aggregated non-identifiable metrics are in scope.
Cross-border transfer approval: on 2025-02-14 the Data Export Committee approved a one-off, already completed export of masked HR payroll extracts to CloudHarbor Technology Pte. Ltd. (Singapore) with TIAs and contractual safeguards; no live transfer is underway.
International transfer stance: Section 33 PDPO is not commenced, but PCPD guidance is applied and model clauses mirror EU SCC safeguards for onward processing limits.
DSAR workflow: access and correction requests under PDPO ss.18–19 are submitted to privacy@harbourcrest.example; all outstanding DSARs are closed and no expedited review is pending.
Consent management: on 2025-03-08 a withdrawal of consent for optional wellness emails by an employee was actioned and the suppression list was updated; no marketing profiles are currently active for staff.
Retention standards: HR files are retained for statutory periods, fund KYC records for seven years post-relationship, and M&A diligence files are kept not more than twelve months after a public outcome on HKEX.
Erasure and restriction: deletions follow the retention schedule and are queued by policy; there are no open erasure exceptions and no override requests from business units.
Data minimisation: onboarding forms collect only role, work contact, and KYC category data; fields labelled “HKID (masked)” and “Account (masked)” are placeholders and free-text is disabled.
Processor governance: Silver Quay Services Limited (HK) provides payroll support and CloudHarbor Technology provides hosting; there are no onward transfers to the US or EU and no insider lists are exported.
Security and audit: DPA Schedule 2 requires encryption at rest, access logs, and quarterly audits; audit evidence is retained for 24 months in the compliance archive.
Regulatory position: this note does not trigger SFC notifications and does not reference control persons or price-sensitive figures; queries may be sent to privacy@harbourcrest.example or dpa@silverquay.example.
